## Section One

- [Restate](https://github.com/restatedev/restate) - journal-based durable execution with `ctx.run` steps and idempotency keys. `maintained`.
- [τ-bench](https://github.com/sierra-research/tau-bench) - LLM user-simulator + tool APIs; introduced `pass^k`. Ships [code](https://example.com/code) *(acquired, still MIT)*. `research`.
- [LangSmith](https://www.langchain.com/langsmith) - framework-native trajectory eval; closed platform. `commercial`.

## Section & Two

- [τ-bench](https://github.com/sierra-research/tau-bench) - cross-listed per ADR-003 with a disambiguation. `research`.
